articles.title: Ronda Rousey Says Paramount Deal Screwed the Carano Fight
articles.description: Ronda Rousey said they originally had a great deal with Dana White for the Carano fight on December show but once the fight got pushed into 2026, the Paramount+ deal nixed it. "We were going to do a New Year's and it was going to be under the last fight under the pay -per -view model and he offered me the best pay -per -view structure ever and I was so grateful but then you know Gina said she needed more time to get in the best shape possible... And once they moved it to the streaming model it's just not about putting on the best fights possible. You know anymore." articles.title: Ronda Rousey: Why UFC Champ selling pictures of her titties on Only Fans 👀
articles.description: Former UFC superstar Ronda Rousey is criticizing the Ultimate Fighting Championship over fighter pay. Rousey says fighters used to see the UFC as the best place in combat sports to make a living, but claims many athletes now struggle financially despite the company’s multi-billion dollar valuation. She even referenced champions like Valentina Shevchenko earning extra money through platforms like OnlyFans. Do you think UFC fighters are underpaid? Comment your thoughts. articles.title: Francis Ngannou Sends Message to Jon Jones Over UFC Contract Dispute
articles.description: Francis Ngannou weighed in on the contract situation surrounding Jon Jones and the UFC. Ngannou spoke about fighter freedom and the challenges athletes face when negotiating with promotions. Ngannou said fighters are private contractors and should be able to walk away if they aren’t getting what they deserve: “We should be able to get what we deserve… and if we don’t get it, we should have the right to walk away and look at other options.” He also discussed how contracts can tie fighters up and lead to situations where promotions may try to lowball them during negotiations. “There is always contracts tying people up… and then when you want to set free they massage you up and lowball you.” Ngannou added that he’s happy to be free from that system now. 👀 What do you think about Francis Ngannou’s message regarding fighter contracts? #FrancisNgannou #JonJones #UFC #MMA #FighterPay #MMAnews Website: http://www.MMAWeekly.com/ Subscribe on Youtube: https://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=MMAWeeklyVideos Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/MMAWeeklycom-176775391774/ Twitter: https://twitter.com/MMAWeeklycom/ Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/mmaweekly/

articles.title: Daniel Cormier & Ben Askren GO IN ON Jon Jones & Dana BEEF, White House card, Masvidal visiting Ben
articles.description: Ben Askren IS BACK with Daniel Cormier for a brand new episode of Funky and the Champ! Ben and DC give their unfiltered thoughts on Charles Oliveira's dominant performance over Max Holloway and why that fight DID NOT live up to BMF fights of the past. Cormier and Askren dive into the public beef between Jon Jones and Dana White over the newly announced White House card, which will be headlined by Justin Gaethje and Ilia Topuria. In spite of his frustration, hear why DC thinks Jones is being far too affected by the situation. And don't miss the talk about Jorge Masvidal visiting Ben over the weekend, Alex Pereira vs. Ciryl Gane, Sean O'Malley, their new rules for the BMF fights going forward, and so much more! All lines provided by @hardrockbet Follow me on all social media platforms! articles.title: Ronda Rousey: I'm Here to Save the UFC from Themselves
articles.description: Former UFC champion Ronda Rousey opened up about how the UFC operates behind the scenes and how things changed once the corporate structure shifted. Rousey said that Dana White offered them a great deal, but once it moved into the Paramount corporate structure after the new year, the decisions were no longer in his hands. According to Rousey: “It was not about putting on the best fights.” Her comments have sparked debate among MMA fans about how much influence corporate structures now have over matchmaking and big fights in the UFC. 👀 What do you think? articles.title: “Francis Ngannou Is BACK" | Tom Aspinall RESPONDS to Pereira vs Gane | BISPING REACTS
articles.description: Michael Bisping reacts to the news that former UFC heavyweight champion Francis Ngannou is returning to MMA on Jake Paul’s MVP fight card. The Predator will face former UFC heavyweight Philipe Lins, as the co-main event to the long-awaited clash between Ronda Rousey and Gina Carano. After huge boxing bouts with Tyson Fury and Anthony Joshua, Ngannou now steps back into the cage looking to make a statement — and possibly move one step closer to a showdown with Jake Paul. Bisping breaks down the matchup, Ngannou’s chances, the wild card of this event, and what it all means for the heavyweight landscape. 👊 🔒 Become a Member for special Perks, Exclusive Content and ultra-exclusive Live Chats: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCDrG2_1TcVkXKXXsD6Kjwig/join ▶️ Follow Michael on Social: https://www.instagram.com/mikebisping https://www.twitter.com/bisping https://www.facebook.com/mikethecountbisping ▶️ Edited by John Brannigan: https://www.instagram.com/johnbranniganuk https://www.twitter.com/johnbranniganuk #bisping #ufc #mma #mixedmartialarts #michaelbisping #ufcnews #mmanews #netflixsports #rouseycarano #francisngannou #jakepaul

articles.title: “Alex Pereira vs Ciryl Gane! NOT Jon Jones!?" UFC White House Card ANNOUNCED! | BISPING REACTS
articles.description: 'HEAVYWEIGHT CONFIRMED! But what about Tom Aspinall and Jon Jones?' Michael Bisping reacts to the newly announced UFC Freedom 250 White House card, featuring massive fights including Ilia Topuria vs Justin Gaethje for the undisputed lightweight title and Alex Pereira vs Ciryl Gane for the interim heavyweight championship. Bisping also discusses what this means for Tom Aspinall, the potential retirement of Jon Jones, and why Pereira vs Gane might actually be a better fight stylistically than Pereira vs Jones. Plus thoughts on the rest of the stacked card including Bo Nickal, Michael Chandler, Diego Lopes vs Steve Garcia, and more. articles.title: Daniel Cormier REACTS to Charles Oliveira beating Max Holloway for BMF title, CRAZY White House card
articles.description: Charles Oliveira beat Max Holloway in DOMINANT fashion to win the BMF belt and become champion at UFC 326, and Daniel Cormier IS BACK from the OCTAGON to give you his reaction to an incredible night from Las Vegas. DC gives his take on Charles' performance and what's next for both Holloway and Oliveira in the division. And don't miss Cormier give his initial thoughts on the White House card that just dropped which will include: Ilia Topuria, Justin Gaethje, Ciryl Gane, Alex Pereira, and Sean O'Malley! Plus DC gets into Caio Borralho beating Reinier de Ridder, Gregory "RoboCop" Rodrigues' CRAZY KNOCKOUT vs. Brunno Ferreira, Cody Brundage's impressive performance in the loss to Donte Johnson, and so much more! articles.title: 'BMF Winner SKIPS Gaethje to Fight Topuria?!' | Francis Ngannou RELEASED by PFL! (Now What?)
articles.description: Use my CODE: BISPING and get to the top of the waitlist for early access to the Polymarket app TODAY! https://polymarket.com/sports/ufc/ Michael Bisping reacts to the latest news ahead of UFC 326, including the Max Holloway vs Charles Oliveira BMF title fight and whether the winner should jump ahead of interim champion Justin Gaethje for a lightweight title shot. Bisping also discusses Francis Ngannou parting ways with the PFL, the upcoming White House UFC card announcement, and a fight cancellation at UFC 326 after a fighter missed weight, breaking down what it all means for the future of the divisions. #bisping #ufc #mma #mixedmartialarts #michaelbisping #ufcnews #mmanews #ufc326 #francisngannou #charlesoliveira #maxholloway #justingaethje

articles.title: 'Is Tom Aspinall being USED by Eddie Hearn!?' | Tom signs with MATCHROOM | BISPING REACTS
articles.description: Use my CODE: BISPING and get to the top of the waitlist for early access to the Polymarket app TODAY! https://polymarket.com/sports/ufc/ Michael Bisping reacts to Tom Aspinall signing with Eddie Hearn and Matchroom in a new commercial advisory deal. The UFC heavyweight champion has been recovering from eye surgery after the Ciryl Gane fight, but now appears to be getting back to business — and this move could have big implications for the future of his career. Could this create tension between Eddie Hearn and Dana White? Is this simply about growing Aspinall’s commercial value, or could it complicate his UFC contract negotiations going forward? And most importantly, when will Tom Aspinall return to the octagon? Bisping breaks down the situation, the potential politics behind the move, and what it could mean for the UFC heavyweight division and Aspinall’s future. 🔒 Become a Member for special Perks, Exclusive Content and ultra-exclusive Live Chats: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCDrG2_1TcVkXKXXsD6Kjwig/join #bisping #ufc #mma #mixedmartialarts #michaelbisping #ufcnews #mmanews #tomaspinall #eddiehearn

articles.title: Daniel Cormier REACTS to Francis Ngannou LEAVING PFL, Francis vs. Jon Jones next?
articles.description: Francis Ngannou has OFFICIALLY left the PFL after fighting one fight in the last two years since joining them, and has now become a free agent that could join the UFC! Daniel Cormier gives his reaction to the huge news in MMA, and why Jon Jones vs. Francis Ngannou at the White House could be the perfect fight. Plus, DC discusses Alex Pereira vs. Jon Jones and where Francis fits into the heavyweight picture. All lines provided by @hardrockbet Follow me on all social media platforms!
